title: Al Fāw Heat Wave
lead: Al Fāw is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +4.06. This extreme weather event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Al Fāw is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 13.2 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 54%, and the wind speed is 19.5 km/h, which is not providing any significant relief from the heat. 
 The city's infrastructure and residents are under immense stress due to this prolonged heat wave, with no Heating Degree Day (HDD) value recorded, indicating no need for heating.
conclusion: Immediate action is required to mitigate the effects of this critical heat wave in Al Fāw.
